style_prefix: 8-bit pixel art, dark noir aesthetic, limited color palette (charcoal, navy, gold accents, warm skin tones), no anti-aliasing, sharp pixels
greenscreen: Solid bright green chroma key background (#00FF00). The background must be a perfectly uniform solid bright green (#00FF00) color with zero variation.
pixel_tips: In 8-bit: hair silhouette, one color pop, one readable accessory (glasses, bag, jewelry), and posture (confident vs. hunched vs. casual lean) do most of the work.

jobs.name: The Legacy Gallerist
jobs.description: an elegant woman in her late 50s, effortlessly pulled-back silver hair, refined bone structure, minimal makeup
jobs.clothing: Crisp white linen shirt, wide-leg cream trousers, one large statement gold earring, expensive tan leather flats. Clean lines, old Céline / Jil Sander energy
jobs.expression: knowing half-smile, quietly powerful, she's seen everything
jobs.posture: upright, relaxed confidence, arms loosely crossed
jobs.notes: Think: owns the space, doesn't need to prove anything. Muted palette.

jobs.name: The It-Girl Dealer
jobs.description: a striking woman in her early 30s, messy expensive dark blonde hair falling past shoulders, striking bone structure
jobs.clothing: Black silk slip dress, slightly undone, one vintage gold chain necklace, bare shoulders. 90s Carolyn Bessette energy. Effortless cool
jobs.expression: bored confidence, slight pout, looking past you like you're lucky she noticed
jobs.posture: casual lean, one shoulder slightly dropped, languid
jobs.color_pop: gold vintage chain against black slip
jobs.notes: Messy hair is key silhouette. Undone luxury. Maybe cigarette in hand.

jobs.name: The Power Collector
jobs.description: a commanding woman in her mid-40s, sleek dark hair pulled tight, sharp features, visible red lipstick
jobs.clothing: Structured red blazer over black top, visible Birkin-style handbag in gold/tan, statement heels implied. Serious money energy
jobs.expression: direct intense stare, knows exactly what she wants, slight calculating smile
jobs.posture: squared shoulders, confident stance, slightly leaned forward
jobs.notes: Birkin silhouette readable even in pixels. Red is the signal.

jobs.name: The Academic Curator
jobs.description: an intellectual woman in her late 40s, short practical hair, distinctive architectural glasses frames
jobs.clothing: Long dark coat layered over muted earth-tone outfit, one unexpected teal or mustard accent scarf, practical leather bag, comfortable shoes. Teaches at Columbia energy
jobs.expression: analytical, slightly skeptical raised eyebrow, studying you like an artwork
jobs.posture: slightly hunched forward, leaning in to examine, intellectual intensity
jobs.notes: Glasses are the key identifier. Layers tell the story. She writes the essays.

jobs.name: The Scene Queen
jobs.description: a magnetic woman in her mid-30s, dark hair with an edge, dramatic eye makeup, dark lipstick
jobs.clothing: All black but make it fashion: leather jacket, dramatic long coat, boots always. Dark lip reads even in 8-bit. Silver ring on every finger
jobs.expression: knowing smirk, she knows every artist and every party, slight danger
jobs.posture: hip cocked, casual dominance, holding a drink
jobs.notes: Silhouette is everything: leather jacket + dramatic coat + boots. All black but FASHION.

jobs.name: The Tech Collector (Female)
jobs.description: a sharp woman in her early 30s, clean ponytail, minimal makeup, athletic build
jobs.clothing: Athleisure-adjacent but expensive: monochrome black techwear jacket, clean lines, white expensive sneakers, maybe a subtle Apple Watch. Bought NFTs early, pivoted to real art
jobs.expression: focused analytical look, slight confident smile, disruption energy
jobs.posture: straight spine, hands in pockets, clean silhouette
jobs.notes: The $800 sneakers read even in pixels. Monochrome clean lines.

jobs.name: The Old Money Gallerist
jobs.description: a distinguished man in his late 60s, silver hair, gentle weathered face, oversized tortoise-shell glasses
jobs.clothing: Muted earth tones: taupe cashmere sweater over cream shirt, olive scarf. Relaxed silhouette but clearly expensive. Loro Piana quiet luxury
jobs.expression: warm paternal smile with sharp eyes underneath, he's reading the room
jobs.posture: relaxed lean, hands clasped, old money ease
jobs.notes: Oversized glasses are the identifier. Everything screams 'I don't need to try.'

jobs.name: The Young Power Dealer
jobs.description: a sharp man in his early 30s, clean-shaven, dark hair swept back, strong jawline
jobs.clothing: All black, sharp silhouette: black turtleneck, black collarless jacket, minimal accessories except one statement silver ring. The Row / Celine energy
jobs.expression: controlled intensity, slight knowing look, he's already three moves ahead
jobs.posture: upright and coiled, angular, power in stillness
jobs.notes: Think: minimum pieces, maximum impact. The silhouette IS the brand.

jobs.name: The Avant-Garde Curator
jobs.description: an androgynous figure in their 40s, asymmetrical dark haircut, angular features, one bold color accent
jobs.clothing: Oversized black deconstructed coat with one bright red panel, cropped trousers, architectural shapes. Comme des Garçons / Rick Owens energy. Unusual proportions
jobs.expression: intense, cerebral, slightly unsettling direct gaze, they see what you don't
jobs.posture: angular stance, one arm at unusual angle, sculptural pose
jobs.notes: Asymmetry is the key. Unusual proportions readable in silhouette. Bold color accent.

jobs.name: The Auction House Type
jobs.description: a distinguished man in his late 50s, salt-and-pepper hair impeccably groomed, clean-shaven, patrician features
jobs.clothing: Navy pinstripe suit, very structured, white pocket square, traditional gold watch, conservative tie. Savile Row, old Christie's energy. Impeccable but not flashy
jobs.expression: commanding authoritative calm, slight raised chin, absolute certainty
jobs.color_pop: white pocket square and gold watch against navy
jobs.notes: Already generated as The Auctioneer. Conservative but impeccable.

jobs.name: The Art Flipper
jobs.description: a flashy man in his late 30s, slicked-back dark hair with too much product, tan, veneers showing
jobs.clothing: Too much: visible designer logo on dark shirt, chunky gold watch, shiny pointed shoes, flashy gold bracelet. Nouveau riche tells everywhere. Trying too hard
jobs.expression: overeager smirk, performative confidence that doesn't quite land
jobs.posture: leaning forward too much, invading space, eager
jobs.color_pop: multiple gold pieces (watch, bracelet, chain) scream new money
jobs.notes: The visual comedy character. Everything is a tell. Reads as 'money but no taste.'

jobs.name: The Underground Connector
jobs.description: a cool man in his late 20s, natural hair or neat locs, relaxed features, knowing half-smile
jobs.clothing: Oversized vintage hoodie under a dark blazer, clean white sneakers, maybe a worn cap. Streetwear meets gallery. Early Supreme / Stüssy roots. Knows the artists before anyone else
jobs.expression: laid-back knowing smile, he already knew about this two years ago
jobs.posture: casual lean, hands in hoodie pocket, effortless cool
jobs.notes: Streetwear x gallery hybrid. The key is the blazer-over-hoodie silhouette.

jobs.name: Elena Ross
jobs.description: a confident gallery owner in her 40s, sharp features, slicked-back dark hair
jobs.clothing: Navy power suit, gold statement earrings, gold necklace

jobs.name: Art Critic
jobs.description: an older female art critic in her 50s, horn-rimmed glasses, silver bob haircut
jobs.clothing: Black turtleneck and dark blazer, holding a small notebook

jobs.name: Julian Vance
jobs.description: a competitive male art collector in his late 30s, slicked-back dark hair, sharp jawline
jobs.clothing: Expensive tailored charcoal suit with gold cufflinks
jobs.expression: intense calculating stare with a slight competitive smirk

jobs.name: Young Artist
jobs.description: a young emerging artist in their mid-20s, messy dark hair, small hoop earring
jobs.clothing: Paint-stained denim jacket over a worn t-shirt

jobs.name: Margaux Villiers
jobs.description: an elegant art advisor in her 50s, refined features, perfectly styled silver hair
jobs.clothing: Cream silk blouse, pearl necklace, vintage Hermès scarf, subtle makeup

jobs.name: Tech Collector (Male)
jobs.description: a young tech billionaire art collector in his early 30s, clean-shaven, modern hairstyle
jobs.clothing: Casual luxury: black cashmere sweater, no tie, expensive watch, AirPods in one ear

jobs.name: Gallery Assistant
jobs.description: a young gallery assistant in their 20s, short stylish hair, friendly face
jobs.clothing: All-black outfit, thin headset microphone, gallery lanyard

jobs.name: Gallery Main Hall
jobs.description: a luxurious white-walled contemporary art gallery interior with hardwood floor, high ceiling, minimalist track lighting, large paintings in gold frames
jobs.atmosphere: A few silhouetted figures examining artwork. Prestigious exclusive atmosphere

jobs.name: Gallery Back Room
jobs.description: a dimly lit gallery storage and viewing room with wooden crates, easels with paintings leaning against them, exposed brick wall, concrete floor
jobs.lighting: Single warm hanging lamp casting a cone of light
jobs.atmosphere: Secretive exclusive atmosphere, a leather chair and small table with papers

jobs.name: Player — Hedge Fund Collector
jobs.description: A stylish art collector in a dark charcoal suit with a briefcase, dark hair. 8-bit noir aesthetic

jobs.name: White Gallery Wall

jobs.name: Hardwood Gallery Floor

jobs.name: Glass Gallery Door
jobs.description: Sleek modern glass door with minimal black metal framing and a gold handle
